mapper.select: SELECT snapshot_id, subject_id, scope, scope_reference_id, total_area, total_owner_count, item_count, aggregate_hash, snapshot_at FROM t_voting_denominator_snapshot WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}

INSERT INTO t_voting_denominator_snapshot ( subject_id, scope, scope_reference_id, total_area, total_owner_count, item_count, aggregate_hash, snapshot_at ) VALUES ( #{subjectId}, #{scope}, #{scopeReferenceId}, #{totalArea}, #{totalOwnerCount}, #{itemCount}, #{aggregateHash}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (subject_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING snapshot_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_voting_denominator_item_snapshot ( snapshot_id, room_id, building_id, certified_area, primary_owner_uid, co_owner_uids, eligibility_flag, row_hash ) VALUES
(#{snapshotId}, #{item.roomId}, #{item.buildingId}, #{item.certifiedArea}, #{item.primaryOwnerUid}, #{item.coOwnerUids}, #{item.eligibilityFlag}, #{item.rowHash})
